skills.name: Adaptive Pattern Learning
skills.summary: Implements adaptive learning through pattern recognition and strategy optimization.

skills.name: API Call
skills.summary: A fundamental skill that enables agents to interact with external services via HTTP API calls.

skills.name: Audience Model
skills.summary: Adapts tone, complexity, and framing of output to match a target audience profile.

skills.name: Autonomous Engineering Platform
skills.summary: An autonomous engineering platform integrating chat, specs, tasks, and code for full agentic software delivery.

skills.name: Bioinformatic Sequence Analysis
skills.summary: Performs biological sequence alignment, similarity searches, multiple sequence alignment (MSA), and genomic variant analysis using standard bioinformatics tools and databases.

skills.name: Browser Control
skills.summary: A foundational skill for interacting directly with the web browser using Chrome DevTools Protocol (CDP).

skills.name: Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
skills.summary: Produces explicit intermediate reasoning steps before arriving at a final answer, dramatically improving accuracy on multi-step problems.

skills.name: Chunk Document
skills.summary: Splits a document into semantically meaningful segments optimized for embedding and retrieval.

skills.name: Cite Sources
skills.summary: Attributes claims to specific sources with proper references, URLs, or bibliographic entries.

skills.name: Classify
skills.summary: Assigns one or more categorical labels to an input based on learned or rule-based criteria.

skills.name: CLI Modernization
skills.summary: Refactors command-line interfaces for improved UX, plugin architecture, and extensibility.

skills.name: Clinical Data Retrieval
skills.summary: Retrieves and parses clinical trial records, drug approvals, regulatory filings, or medical variant databases (e.g. ClinicalTrials.gov, OpenFDA, ClinVar).

skills.name: Code Execution
skills.summary: Writes and executes code in a sandboxed environment, uses the runtime output to verify correctness, and iterates until the result is correct.

skills.name: Code Explain
skills.summary: Generates accurate natural-language explanations of source code, describing intent, logic flow, and key decisions at function or module level.

skills.name: Code Generation
skills.summary: Produces syntactically correct and functionally appropriate source code from specifications or prompts.

skills.name: Computer Use
skills.summary: Controls desktop GUIs and web browsers by interpreting screenshots, issuing mouse/keyboard actions, and verifying visual state to complete open-ended computer tasks.

skills.name: Context Compression
skills.summary: Reduces the length of prompts or retrieved context to fit token limits while preserving semantic content, using techniques such as selective token removal, summarization, or token-classification-based pruning (e.g. LLMLingua).

skills.name: Core Platform Implementation
skills.summary: Implements foundational platform architecture including plugin discovery, server lifecycle management, and API contracts.

skills.name: Cultural Localization
skills.summary: Adapts content for regional audiences beyond translation: idioms, cultural nuance, tone, trust conventions, and regional compliance for culturally faithful output.

skills.name: Data Visualize
skills.summary: Generates charts, graphs, and visual summaries from datasets by selecting appropriate visualization types and mapping data dimensions.

skills.name: Diff Content
skills.summary: Compares two versions of content and produces a structured delta highlighting additions, deletions, and modifications.

skills.name: Document Editing
skills.summary: Reads, edits, repacks, and applies styling or design principles to structured binary document formats such as PPTX, DOCX, and XLSX.

skills.name: Domain Modeling
skills.summary: Build and maintain a shared domain model with ubiquitous language and architectural decision records.

skills.name: Embed Text
skills.summary: Converts text into dense vector representations suitable for similarity search and clustering.

skills.name: Error Interpretation
skills.summary: Diagnoses error messages, stack traces, and failure modes to identify root causes and suggest fixes.

skills.name: Evaluate Output
skills.summary: Assesses the quality, correctness, or safety of generated output against defined criteria.

skills.name: Extract Entities
skills.summary: Identifies and extracts named entities such as people, organizations, dates, and locations from text.

skills.name: Feed Monitoring
skills.summary: Monitors RSS, Atom, blog, or other recurring content feeds, discovers updates, tracks read state, and surfaces new signals for downstream agent workflows.

skills.name: Few-Shot Learning
skills.summary: Conditions a language model on a small number of input-output demonstrations within the prompt, enabling task adaptation without weight updates.

skills.name: Fine-Tune
skills.summary: Adapts a pre-trained model to a new task or domain by updating model weights using parameter-efficient methods such as LoRA, QLoRA, or full supervised fine-tuning, without retraining from scratch.

skills.name: Format Output
skills.summary: Structures raw output into a specified format such as markdown, JSON, CSV, or HTML.

skills.name: Framework Upgrade
skills.summary: Guides an agent through upgrading a project from one major framework version to another, including breaking-change detection, migration steps, and post-upgrade validation.

skills.name: Generate SQL
skills.summary: Translates natural-language data questions into syntactically correct, executable SQL queries against a given schema.

skills.name: Generate Test
skills.summary: Produces comprehensive unit, integration, and edge-case test suites from source code.

skills.name: Generate Text
skills.summary: Produces coherent natural language output given a prompt, instruction, or context window.

skills.name: Genomic Data Retrieval
skills.summary: Queries and retrieves DNA sequence data, transcription factor binding models, cis-regulatory elements, and genetic annotations from genomic repositories (e.g. Ensembl, GTEx, JASPAR, UniBind, ENCODE, UCSC, dbSNP).

skills.name: Git Diff Risk Analysis
skills.summary: Analyzes git diffs for complexity, churn, and risk scores to prioritize review attention and flag dangerous changes.

skills.name: Headless Worker Collect
skills.summary: Aggregates and formats results from distributed headless workers stored in shared memory with filtering and status reporting.

skills.name: Headless Worker Spawn
skills.summary: Launches headless AI worker processes for parallel background task execution with configurable worker types and shared memory coordination.

skills.name: Hybrid Workflow Coordination
skills.summary: Routes tasks between interactive reasoning phases and parallel background execution with configurable workflow templates.

skills.name: Hypothesis Generation
skills.summary: Formulates novel, testable scientific hypotheses by synthesising existing literature, identifying knowledge gaps, and proposing mechanistic explanations.

skills.name: Image Caption
skills.summary: Generates accurate natural-language descriptions of images, capturing objects, actions, and spatial relationships.

skills.name: Image Generate
skills.summary: Creates photorealistic or stylized images from text prompts using diffusion-based or autoregressive generative models.

skills.name: Issue Triage
skills.summary: Classifies incoming issue reports through a structured state machine, assigns triage roles (bug/enhancement, needs-info/ready-for-agent/wontfix), reproduces bugs, requests missing detail, and produces structured resolution briefs for agent or human handoff.

skills.name: Literature Search
skills.summary: Queries and searches academic literature databases (e.g. PubMed, arXiv, bioRxiv, OpenAlex) to locate papers, retrieve abstracts, resolve citations, and fetch full-text documents.

skills.name: Logical Inference
skills.summary: Applies deductive, inductive, or abductive reasoning to derive valid conclusions from premises and structured knowledge.

skills.name: Math Reason
skills.summary: Solves multi-step mathematical problems including arithmetic, algebra, calculus, and competition mathematics through symbolic and numeric reasoning.

skills.name: MCP Integration
skills.summary: Connect to and invoke tools exposed by Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers \u2014 enumerate available tools, execute calls, and handle responses across any MCP-compatible backend.

skills.name: Memory Pattern Design
skills.summary: Designs recurring memory storage patterns for AI agents with LRU caching, SQLite persistence, and associative retrieval.

skills.name: Molecular Databases
skills.summary: Queries and retrieves structural, chemical, and biological activity data for small molecules, chemical compounds, or drug candidates from molecular repositories (e.g., ChEMBL, PubChem).

skills.name: Multi-Repo Coordination
skills.summary: Manages synchronized operations across multiple repositories including cross-repo PRs, dependency tracking, and bulk workflow automation.

skills.name: Object Detection
skills.summary: Locates and classifies multiple objects within images by producing bounding boxes, confidence scores, and category labels in a single forward pass.

skills.name: OCR
skills.summary: Extracts machine-readable text from raster images, scanned pages, and photo documents using optical character recognition, preserving layout and handling skew, noise, and varied fonts.

skills.name: Parallel Execution
skills.summary: Decompose a task into independent sub-tasks and execute them concurrently, merging results with configurable concurrency limits and queue-based state tracking.

skills.name: Parse HTML
skills.summary: Extracts structured content from raw HTML, navigating DOM trees and handling malformed markup.

skills.name: Parse JSON
skills.summary: Extracts structured data from JSON-formatted input, handling nested objects and arrays.

skills.name: Parse PDF
skills.summary: Extracts text, tables, equations, and structure from PDF documents, preserving layout and reading order.

skills.name: Pathway Ontology Retrieval
skills.summary: Queries, parses, and resolves biological pathway models, cellular reactions, and hierarchical ontology metadata from pathway and ontology search systems (e.g., Reactome, QuickGO, EMBL-EBI OLS).

skills.name: Performance Tuning
skills.summary: Profiles execution hotspots, measures throughput and latency, and applies targeted optimizations to reduce resource consumption.

skills.name: Plan and Decompose
skills.summary: Breaks a complex objective into an ordered sequence of executable sub-tasks.

skills.name: Probabilistic Programming
skills.summary: Specifies Bayesian models and runs inference (MCMC/NUTS, variational) to quantify epistemic and aleatoric uncertainty using PyMC, Stan, Pyro, or NumPyro.

skills.name: Prompt Injection Defense
skills.summary: Detects and neutralizes adversarial instructions injected into agent context from untrusted external sources (indirect prompt injection), using techniques such as context isolation, hierarchical intent verification, or semantic consistency checks.

skills.name: Protein Structure Analysis
skills.summary: Analyzes, searches, and aligns three-dimensional macromolecular structures using structural databases, alignment search algorithms (e.g. Foldseek, PDB search), or molecular modeling tools.

skills.name: Proteomic Data Retrieval
skills.summary: Queries and retrieves amino acid sequences, protein families, functional domains, tissue distribution, and protein-protein interactions from proteomic repositories (e.g. UniProt, InterPro, Human Protein Atlas, STRING).

skills.name: Question Answer
skills.summary: Produces accurate, context-grounded answers to natural-language questions, handling unanswerable cases.

skills.name: Rank
skills.summary: Orders a set of candidate items by relevance, quality, or fitness for a given objective.

skills.name: Refactor Code
skills.summary: Restructures existing source code to improve readability, maintainability, or performance without changing observable behavior.

skills.name: Requirements Analysis
skills.summary: Elicit and structure requirements from stakeholder inputs into formal specifications \u2014 user stories, acceptance criteria, and traceability matrices.

skills.name: Retrieve
skills.summary: Fetches relevant documents or passages from an indexed corpus given a query.

skills.name: Reward Modeling
skills.summary: Learns a scalar reward signal from human preference comparisons between model outputs, enabling reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) to align model behavior with human values.

skills.name: Route Intent
skills.summary: Classifies user intent and directs execution to the appropriate handler, tool, or sub-agent.

skills.name: Schema Design
skills.summary: Design database schemas across relational, NoSQL, graph, and time-series stores \u2014 entity modelling, normalization, indexing strategies, and migration planning.

skills.name: Scientific Visualization
skills.summary: Creates publication-ready scientific figures and visualizes molecular structures.

skills.name: Score Relevance
skills.summary: Assigns a numerical relevance score to candidate items relative to a query or objective.

skills.name: Self-Consistency
skills.summary: Samples multiple independent reasoning paths for the same problem and selects the answer by majority vote, improving robustness without any additional training.

skills.name: Self-Critique
skills.summary: Iteratively evaluates and refines its own outputs using self-generated feedback, improving quality without external supervision.

skills.name: Semantic Cache
skills.summary: Stores LLM responses keyed by embedding similarity so that semantically equivalent queries are served from cache, reducing inference latency and token cost without sacrificing answer quality.

skills.name: Sentiment Analysis
skills.summary: Classifies the affective polarity (positive / negative / neutral, or fine-grained) of user-generated text. Covers pipelines from raw noisy input through preprocessing, inference (Transformer, Lexicon, or LLM), and output normalisation.

skills.name: Sequential Agent Pipeline
skills.summary: Chains agent outputs sequentially so each step's result feeds the next, enabling multi-stage data transformation and coordinated processing.

skills.name: Skill Discovery
skills.summary: Searches a skill or tool registry, ranks results by relevance and install count, and surfaces candidates for the agent to adopt or invoke.

skills.name: Software Design
skills.summary: Design software modules with clean interfaces, seams, and deep implementations for maintainability and testability.

skills.name: Speech to Text
skills.summary: Transcribes spoken audio into accurate text, handling diverse accents, noise conditions, and multiple languages.

skills.name: Statistical Analysis
skills.summary: Performs hypothesis testing, regression analysis, and Bayesian modelling with effect size calculation and APA-formatted statistical reporting using scipy, statsmodels, and PyMC.

skills.name: Structured Output Generation
skills.summary: Generates output guaranteed to conform to a given schema (JSON, YAML, Pydantic model, etc.) using constrained decoding or grammar-guided generation.

skills.name: Summarize
skills.summary: Condenses longer input into a shorter representation that preserves key information and intent.

skills.name: Swarm Topology Management
skills.summary: Initializes and manages multi-agent swarm network topologies (hierarchical, mesh, ring, star) with load balancing and fault tolerance.

skills.name: Synthetic Data Generation
skills.summary: Generates privacy-preserving, domain-representative datasets via tabular synthesis and generative models, infusing schema and regulatory constraints to substitute for sensitive real data.

skills.name: System Integration
skills.summary: Connects disparate subsystems via shared contracts, event buses, and compatibility layers for coherent cross-component operation.

skills.name: Test-Driven Development
skills.summary: Enforces a strict red-green-refactor TDD loop: writes failing tests before implementation, blocks code generation that skips the test step, and validates coverage thresholds before marking tasks complete.

skills.name: Text to Speech
skills.summary: Synthesizes natural-sounding speech audio from text input, supporting voice cloning and prosody control.

skills.name: Time Series Forecasting
skills.summary: Forecasts temporal sequences with seasonal-trend decomposition, ensemble models (ARIMA, Prophet, NBEATS, TFT), and residual-based anomaly detection.

skills.name: Token Observability
skills.summary: Observability tool for tracking AI coding agent token spend locally.

skills.name: Tokenize
skills.summary: Splits input text into discrete tokens suitable for downstream processing by language models.

skills.name: Tool Select
skills.summary: Chooses the most appropriate tool or API from a set of available options given a task description.

skills.name: Tool Use
skills.summary: Invokes external functions or APIs by generating well-formed call signatures, parsing results, and incorporating them into reasoning.

skills.name: Translate
skills.summary: Converts text from one natural language to another while preserving meaning, tone, and formatting.

skills.name: UX Audit
skills.summary: Systematically evaluates a user interface against established usability heuristics or accessibility standards, producing a scored finding report with remediation recommendations.

skills.name: Vector DB Optimization
skills.summary: Tunes vector database indices, sharding strategies, and multi-database coordination for production-scale retrieval.

skills.name: Vector Search
skills.summary: Performs similarity search over high-dimensional embeddings using cosine, Euclidean, dot-product, or custom distance metrics.

skills.name: Visual Question Answering
skills.summary: Answers natural-language questions grounded in a specific image or screenshot by combining visual perception with language reasoning, enabling visual debugging, UI analysis, and document-image Q&A.

skills.name: Web Search
skills.summary: Queries external search engines or APIs and retrieves relevant result sets.

skills.name: Worker Agent Dispatch
skills.summary: Maps trigger events to optimal agent combinations for background task execution with performance tracking and continuous feedback.

skills.name: Write Report
skills.summary: Produces structured, multi-section written output with headings, citations, and coherent narrative.

skills.name: Advanced Swarm Coordination
skills.summary: Domain-specific swarm patterns for research, development, testing, and analysis workflows with neural learning and cross-session state persistence.

skills.name: Adversarial Robustness Testing
skills.summary: Systematically red-teams models with adversarial and multi-turn jailbreak prompts, input perturbations, and semantic-preserving transformations to measure resilience at scale.

skills.name: agent-environment-setup
skills.summary: Scaffolding per-repo configuration for other engineering skills.

skills.name: Agent Evaluation
skills.summary: Holistically evaluates an AI agent's performance on multi-step tasks by running standardised benchmarks, scoring full interaction trajectories, and producing reproducible capability reports.

skills.name: agent-handoff
skills.summary: Compacting the current conversation into a summary for a fresh agent.

skills.name: Agent Memory Learning
skills.summary: Builds self-improving agent memory by analyzing task success patterns and adapting retrieval strategies with AgentDB-backed persistence.

skills.name: Agent Memory Platform
skills.summary: Complete AgentDB vector memory ecosystem: QUIC-synchronized distributed vector storage, adaptive pattern learning, memory pattern design, database optimization, and semantic vector search.

skills.name: Agentic Workflow Design
skills.summary: Autonomously designs, authors, and iterates on complex multi-step workflows by translating high-level goals into executable DAGs or playbooks, managing task dependencies and distributed execution environments.

skills.name: Architecture Diagram
skills.summary: Generates technical architecture, infrastructure, or cloud diagrams as structured visual artifacts from natural-language system descriptions.

skills.name: Automated Testing
skills.summary: Generates test suites, executes them in a sandbox, interprets failures, and iterates until the target pass rate is reached.

skills.name: Autonomous Data Scientist
skills.summary: Conducts end-to-end data science workflows autonomously: hypothesis generation, data analysis, statistical modeling, and insight reporting.

skills.name: Autonomous Debug
skills.summary: Independently identifies, diagnoses, and fixes software bugs through code generation and execution.

skills.name: Autonomous Web Research
skills.summary: Independently surveys, maps, and extracts structured information from the web by autonomously deciding which domains to crawl and synthesizing data into comprehensive research reports.

skills.name: Brainstorming
skills.summary: Explores user intent, requirements, and design before implementation.

skills.name: Browser Automation
skills.summary: Navigates web pages, fills forms, clicks elements, and extracts information by combining web search with screenshot-based GUI control to complete multi-step web tasks.

skills.name: Career Operations
skills.summary: Orchestrates an end-to-end job application pipeline, including automated search, fit evaluation, and tailored CV/cover letter generation.

skills.name: Causal Inference
skills.summary: Estimates treatment effects and identifies causal relationships from observational and experimental data using propensity scoring, instrumental variables, and causal graphs.

skills.name: Cloud Platform Management
skills.summary: Full lifecycle management of cloud AI platforms including user auth, sandbox environments, app store deployment, payments, and challenge systems. Home of the Queen Seraphina AI assistant.

skills.name: Code Review Pipeline
skills.summary: Performs automated code review by generating, diffing, and evaluating code changes for correctness, style, security, and maintainability.

skills.name: Collaborative Diagramming
skills.summary: Generates and manages digital diagrams, flowcharts, and architecture maps in web-native or collaborative formats, optimized for hand-drawn aesthetics or structured vector output.

skills.name: Computational Biology Workflows
skills.summary: Integrates structural, genomic, proteomic, and molecular database querying with bioinformatics analysis (such as sequence alignment, structure prediction, and molecular rendering) to solve multi-step, complex computational biology tasks.

skills.name: Content Moderation
skills.summary: Detects policy-violating content by combining intent classification, sentiment scoring, and entity extraction across text, images, and mixed media.

skills.name: Conversational Agent
skills.summary: Manages coherent multi-turn dialogue by routing intent, maintaining memory across turns, and generating contextually appropriate responses.

skills.name: Data Analysis
skills.summary: Conducts end-to-end quantitative analysis: queries data via SQL, computes statistics, generates visualizations, and summarizes findings.

skills.name: Deployment Automation
skills.summary: Automate CI/CD pipeline execution and deployment to target environments \u2014 build, test, artifact publishing, environment promotion, and rollback strategies.

skills.name: Design Generation
skills.summary: Generates high-fidelity visual assets, prototypes, and UI components from design intent or discovery forms, adhering to brand and UX standards.

skills.name: Design Review
skills.summary: Stress-tests a plan or design through relentless targeted questioning, walking the decision tree branch-by-branch, resolving concept dependencies, surfacing contradictions against the existing codebase, and crystallising ubiquitous language \u2014 optionally persisting resolved decisions to CONTEXT.md and ADRs.

skills.name: Design System Extraction
skills.summary: Automates the discovery and extraction of design tokens, component architectures, and CSS configurations from live web applications or URLs.

skills.name: Detect Anomaly
skills.summary: Identifies statistical outliers, novel patterns, or deviations from expected behavior in structured or unstructured data.

skills.name: Dispatching Parallel Agents
skills.summary: Delegates independent tasks to specialized agents with isolated context to work concurrently.

skills.name: Hive Mind Coordination
skills.summary: Queen-led collective intelligence with Byzantine, majority, and weighted consensus mechanisms, eight worker specializations, and persistent collective SQLite memory with LRU caching.

skills.name: Distributed Neural Training
skills.summary: Trains neural networks (feedforward, LSTM, GAN, autoencoder, transformer) across distributed E2B sandbox clusters with federated learning and model marketplace publishing.

skills.name: Distributed Vector Memory
skills.summary: Sub-millisecond cross-node vector synchronization using QUIC protocol with hybrid metadata-filtered search and MMR diversity retrieval.

skills.name: Document Analyst
skills.summary: Parses, extracts entities from, summarizes, and formats structured documents.

skills.name: Dual Mode
skills.summary: Orchestrates hybrid Claude+Codex workflows: spawns headless parallel workers, coordinates task routing between interactive and background phases, and collects distributed results.

skills.name: End-to-End Testing
skills.summary: Execute full end-to-end user journey tests using browser automation frameworks (Playwright/Puppeteer), validating complete workflows from UI to backend across real environments.

skills.name: Edge Optimization
skills.summary: Compresses and tunes models for low-latency on-device inference via quantization, pruning, knowledge distillation, and federated learning under resource constraints.

skills.name: mattpocock-engineering
skills.summary: Engineering category suite for Matt Pocock's skills.

skills.name: Executing Plans
skills.summary: Loads a written implementation plan, reviews it critically, executes all tasks sequentially, and reports when complete.

skills.name: Explainability Audit
skills.summary: Audits model transparency by computing feature-importance attributions (SHAP, LIME) and intrinsic-interpretability metrics, surfacing them as governance evidence.

skills.name: Financial Modeling
skills.summary: Builds financial projections, DCF and LBO valuation models, Monte Carlo simulations, and portfolio optimization by querying data, computing statistics, and running sensitivity analysis.

skills.name: Finishing a Development Branch
skills.summary: Guides completion of development work by presenting structured options for merge, PR, or cleanup, verifying tests first.

skills.name: Full-Stack Developer
skills.summary: Autonomously implements, reviews, tests, and refactors complete software features across the full development lifecycle from specification to merged PR.

skills.name: Function Calling
skills.summary: Selects an external callable, emits schema-valid arguments, invokes the function or API, and integrates the returned result into the agent loop.

skills.name: Generative Media
skills.summary: Generates and manipulates images, video, and audio through complex node-based or scripted generative workflows, managing model dependencies and parameter injection.

skills.name: Ghostwrite
skills.summary: Produces audience-tailored, research-backed long-form written content.

skills.name: GitHub Platform Mastery
skills.summary: Full GitHub platform automation: code review pipelines, multi-repo coordination, project management, release management, and workflow automation.

skills.name: Graph-Driven Issue Triage
skills.summary: Combines codebase or knowledge-graph construction with automated issue triage: ingest a graph artifact, surface architectural debt or missing-prerequisite signals from the graph topology, and convert each finding into a tracked issue with reproducible evidence.

skills.name: Grill Me
skills.summary: Conducts a relentless, one-question-at-a-time Socratic interview to stress-test designs and force the resolution of hidden assumptions before code is written.

skills.name: Grill With Docs
skills.summary: The apex of agentic design alignment. Fuses relentless Socratic questioning with deep domain awareness, ensuring every decision is cross-referenced against a persistent ubiquitous language and documented via real-time ADR generation.

skills.name: Grounding
skills.summary: Verifies generated claims against retrieved evidence, identifies unsupported or contradicted assertions, and anchors outputs in traceable, cited sources.

skills.name: Guardrails
skills.summary: Wraps LLM outputs with programmatic safety rules, content filters, and topical constraints that detect policy violations and enforce compliant, on-policy responses before they reach the user.

skills.name: Humanize Prose
skills.summary: Audits and rewrites prose to remove generic AI-writing patterns, preserve author intent, and adapt tone toward a more natural human voice.

skills.name: Knowledge Graph Construction
skills.summary: Extracts entities and relations from unstructured text, resolves co-references, and assembles them into a queryable graph structure with typed edges.

skills.name: Knowledge Harvest
skills.summary: Extracts, structures, and embeds knowledge from web sources into a searchable corpus.

skills.name: Knowledge Management
skills.summary: Organizes, relates, and retrieves information across structured pages, databases, and shared knowledge bases, maintaining semantic links between information nodes.

skills.name: Literature Review
skills.summary: Conducts systematic multi-database academic literature searches following PRISMA/SWARM protocols, screens and synthesises findings, verifies all citations, and generates a structured review report.

skills.name: Mathematical Animation
skills.summary: Produces programmatic mathematical and algorithmic animations with high pedagogical and visual quality, utilizing LaTeX for notation and geometric coordinate systems for spatial layout.

skills.name: MCP Debugger Control
skills.summary: Exposes low-level debugger capabilities (breakpoints, stepping, stack inspection, variable evaluation) to AI agents via the Model Context Protocol, enabling real-time runtime diagnosis and autonomous bug fixing.

skills.name: MCP Server Creation
skills.summary: Designs and implements Model Context Protocol servers that expose external APIs, files, or services as well-typed tools with clear schemas, authentication, and testable agent workflows.

skills.name: Memory Manage
skills.summary: Maintains, indexes, and retrieves conversational and long-term memory across sessions, managing context window constraints.

skills.summary: Manages machine learning models, datasets, and experiment logs through centralized hub or tracking repositories, handling versioning and metadata extraction.

skills.summary: Designs and implements production ML pipelines with experiment tracking (MLflow, W&B), feature stores (Feast), orchestration (Kubeflow, Airflow), and automated retraining workflows including model evaluation gates and A/B deployment.

skills.name: Multi-Agent Debate

skills.name: Multi-Agent Orchestration
skills.summary: Coordinates multiple specialized agents across complex workflows with dynamic task allocation and conflict resolution.

skills.summary: Managing notes and organization in a specific vault.

skills.summary: Agent iteratively refines its own prompts, tools, or strategies based on performance feedback loops.

skills.name: Registry Curation
skills.summary: Systematically discovers, evaluates, and ingests new skill definitions into a structured skill registry: researching capabilities, sourcing reproducible evidence, scripting graph updates, validating schema and DAG integrity, and publishing via pull request.

skills.name: Gaia Audit
skills.summary: Reviews one Gaia skill, named skill, or real-skill catalog item against current evidence, source URLs, taxonomy mapping, promotion status, and demotion criteria, then proposes the smallest source-of-truth correction. Implements a sophisticated 7-phase audit discipline including evidence re-verification, demotion checks, and automatic asset regeneration.

skills.name: Gaia Meta Audit
skills.summary: Scans Gaia registry and real-skill catalog entries for review candidates whose evidence may be outdated, superseded, overpromoted, unmapped, stale, or insufficient for their current level or named-skill claim.

skills.name: Regulatory Compliance Mapping
skills.summary: Cross-references regulatory requirements (GDPR, SOC2, HIPAA) against implementation controls using knowledge-graph-augmented retrieval to detect compliance gaps and drift.

skills.name: Release Automation
skills.summary: Automate the full software release cycle: determine semantic version bump, update CHANGELOG, commit, create a git tag, and publish a GitHub release with release notes.

skills.name: Requesting Code Review
skills.summary: Dispatches a code reviewer subagent to catch issues before they cascade, providing isolated context for evaluation.

skills.name: Research
skills.summary: Conducts multi-source information gathering, synthesis, and citation for a given topic.

skills.name: Autonomous Scientific Discovery
skills.summary: Autonomously generates novel scientific hypotheses, designs and executes experiments, analyses results, and produces a written report \u00e2\u20ac\u201d completing a full research cycle without human intervention.

skills.name: Scientific Writing
skills.summary: Composes research manuscripts in IMRAD structure with reporting-guideline compliance (CONSORT, STROBE, PRISMA), citation management, publication-quality figures, and LaTeX/PDF formatting.

skills.name: search-engine-optimization
skills.summary: Search Engine Optimization

skills.name: Security Audit
skills.summary: Systematically identify security vulnerabilities, assess attack surface, and produce actionable remediation guidance across code, dependencies, and infrastructure.

skills.name: Skill Authoring
skills.summary: Designs, writes, packages, and iteratively improves reusable agent skill directories with metadata, progressive instructions, supporting assets, and measurable trigger criteria.

skills.name: Skill Performance Benchmarking
skills.summary: Builds and runs task suites that measure whether agents select, invoke, and complete installed skills correctly across artifact-rich workflows and repeated trials.

skills.name: Skill Security Analysis
skills.summary: Assesses third-party agent skills for malicious behavior, unsafe permissions, prompt-injection exposure, repository-context mismatch, and supply-chain risk before installation or invocation.

skills.name: Stealth Browser Interaction
skills.summary: Operates web browsers through an advanced stealth layer that handles bot-detection, fingerprinting, session rotation, and human-like interaction patterns to maintain resilient access to protected domains.

skills.name: Subagent-Driven Development
skills.summary: Executes plans by dispatching a fresh subagent per task with a two-stage review (spec compliance then code quality).

skills.name: Supply Chain Optimization
skills.summary: Orchestrates inventory, logistics, and procurement decisions using demand forecasting, EOQ and safety-stock computation, route optimization, and anomaly-aware fulfilment monitoring.

skills.name: Systematic Debugging
skills.summary: Finds the root cause before attempting fixes when encountering bugs, test failures, or unexpected behavior.

skills.name: Text-to-SQL Pipeline
skills.summary: Converts natural-language queries into validated, executable SQL against a target schema and returns formatted result sets.

skills.name: Threat Intelligence Synthesis
skills.summary: Synthesizes security feeds, CVE/CWE data, and incident signals into actionable intelligence with IoC/TTP management and MITRE ATT&CK mapping.

skills.name: Tool Chaining
skills.summary: Sequences multiple tool invocations into a dependency graph where the output of each tool feeds as structured input to the next, handling state propagation, intermediate result validation, and error recovery across multi-step execution pipelines.

skills.name: Tool Creation
skills.summary: Dynamically generates reusable tool functions (code) at runtime to solve novel sub-tasks, then invokes those tools to complete the overall objective without human-written APIs.

skills.name: Translation Pipeline
skills.summary: Translates content end-to-end while preserving sentiment and adapting tone and register for the target audience.

skills.name: Tree of Thought
skills.summary: Frames problem solving as a search over a tree of partial solutions, using LLM-generated evaluations to prune unpromising branches and backtrack, dramatically improving success on complex reasoning tasks.

skills.name: Ubiquitous Language
skills.summary: Establishes and maintains a consistent, domain-driven vocabulary between the agent and human, formalising terminology in a shared glossary (typically CONTEXT.md) to reduce ambiguity and token waste.

skills.name: Using Git Worktrees
skills.summary: Ensures work happens in an isolated workspace via native tools or git worktree fallback before starting feature work.

skills.name: Verification Before Completion
skills.summary: Requires running verification commands and confirming output before claiming work is complete, fixed, or passing.

skills.name: Vertical Slice Planning
skills.summary: Decomposes a product plan into independently-demoable vertical slices that each cut through all integration layers end-to-end. Classifies each slice as HITL (human-in-the-loop) or AFK (autonomous), identifies dependency ordering, and publishes structured issues with acceptance criteria.

skills.name: Video Intelligence
skills.summary: Processes video streams by extracting frames, transcribing audio, and applying multimodal reasoning to understand temporal and visual context.

skills.name: Voice Agent
skills.summary: Handles spoken interactions end-to-end: transcribes audio input, produces language responses, and synthesizes speech output.

skills.summary: Accessibility

skills.summary: Web Best Practices

skills.name: web-quality-audit
skills.summary: Orchestrates a multi-axis web quality audit covering performance (Core Web Vitals), accessibility (WCAG), SEO, and best practices, producing actionable remediation plans from Lighthouse and real-user data.

skills.name: Web Scrape
skills.summary: Retrieves and structures data from web pages into usable entities.

skills.name: Wiki Search
skills.summary: Builds, maintains, and queries an interlinked markdown or wiki-style knowledge base so an agent can retrieve durable local context across research sessions.

skills.name: Workflow Automation
skills.summary: Designs, configures, and runs trigger-based multi-step automation pipelines that connect external services, schedule jobs, and orchestrate tool sequences without continuous human supervision.

skills.name: Workspace Automation
skills.summary: Orchestrates productivity tasks across email, calendar, drive, and documents through unified office suite integrations, automating scheduling and file management.

skills.name: Writing Plans
skills.summary: Writes comprehensive implementation plans breaking down multi-step tasks into bite-sized sub-tasks.

skills.name: X/Twitter Automation
skills.summary: Coordinates platform-specific X/Twitter search, tweet and reply retrieval, user lookup, follower export, monitoring, and approval-gated write workflows for social-media agent tasks.

skills.name: Founder Mode
skills.summary: Garry Tan's complete autonomous agent discipline suite spanning 19 named skills: browser QA, security auditing, design system creation, HTML generation, plan reviews (CEO/eng/design/DX), code review, root-cause debugging, E2E testing, ship/deploy automation, post-deploy canary monitoring, documentation, and founder-mode orchestration.

skills.name: Git Ship Done Pipeline
skills.summary: Fuses decision capture, planning, parallel execution, verification, and shipping into a repeatable agentic software delivery pipeline.

skills.name: Ruflo
skills.summary: The complete Ruflo AI orchestration platform: multi-topology swarm deployment, cloud platform management, GitHub automation, hive-mind consensus, reasoning memory bank, and full v3 architecture modernization.

skills.name: mattpocock-skills
skills.summary: Ultimate capstone suite for Matt Pocock's skills.

skills.name: Superpowers
skills.summary: A complete software development methodology for coding agents: combines brainstorming, planning, parallel execution, systematic debugging, code review loops, and branch discipline into a unified agentic workflow.
